title: EP: UNION injection payload in email should leak or alter query results
precondition: Application is running and email field is accessible
test_steps:
Enter the injection payload '' UNION SELECT NULL, username, password FROM users--' into the email field
Submit the form/request
test_data: ' UNION SELECT NULL, username, password FROM users--
expected_result: The application exhibits SQL injection symptoms: additional data displayed (e.g., username/password) or error messages indicating query modification.

title: DT: Supply UNION injection payload triggers leak/alter action
test_steps:
Input a UNION injection payload (e.g., ' UNION SELECT 1,2,3-- ) into the email field
Submit
expected_result: Leak or alter query results occurs: extra data appears in response or data is modified.

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Query results are leaked or altered due to UNION injection in the email field.
coverage_items: Normal--inject_union[UNION-based injection payload is supplied in the email field]/leak or alter query results-->Compromised
